languages.text: "Каковы предполагаемые численность и состав войск врага?"
"What are the estimated numbers and composition of the enemy's forces?"
languages.original_text: "Каковы предполагаемые численность и состав войск врага?"

traits.locale_text: "What are the estimated numbers and composition of the enemy's forces?"
"What are the estimated numbers and composition of the enemy's forces?"
"What are the estimated numbers and composition of the enemy's forces?"

languages.text: 「敵の兵力は何人、何の構成か？」
languages.original_text: "What are the estimated numbers and composition of the enemy's forces?"

traits.locale_text: 「敵の兵力は何人、何の構成か？」

languages.text: «¿Cuál es la cantidad y composición estimada de las fuerzas enemigas?».
languages.original_text: "What are the estimated numbers and composition of the enemy's forces?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Cuál es la cantidad y composición estimada de las fuerzas enemigas?».

languages.text: “敌军预估的数量和构成如何？”
languages.original_text: "What are the estimated numbers and composition of the enemy's forces?"

traits.locale_text: “敌军预估的数量和构成如何？”

languages.text: "Haben wir Daten zur Zahl und Zusammensetzung der feindlichen Kräfte?"
languages.original_text: "What are the estimated numbers and composition of the enemy's forces?"

traits.locale_text: "Haben wir Daten zur Zahl und Zusammensetzung der feindlichen Kräfte?"

languages.text: "Düşman kuvvetlerinin tahminî sayısı ve tertibi nedir?"
languages.original_text: "What are the estimated numbers and composition of the enemy's forces?"

traits.locale_text: "Düşman kuvvetlerinin tahminî sayısı ve tertibi nedir?"

languages.text: « À combien estime-t-on le nombre d'unités de l'ennemi ? Quelle est la composition de ses forces ? »
languages.original_text: "What are the estimated numbers and composition of the enemy's forces?"

traits.locale_text: « À combien estime-t-on le nombre d'unités de l'ennemi ? Quelle est la composition de ses forces ? »
